name: 40_Text_Summarization_BART_CNNDailyMail_DL
query: Tengeneza mfumo unaofanya muhtasari wa maandishi kwa kutumia mfano wa BART na seti ya data ya CNN/Daily Mail. Anza kwa kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`, kisha fanya usindikaji wa data kama vile kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji katika `src/data_loader.py`. Leta mfano wa BART uliokwisha funzwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py` ili kuzalisha muhtasari. Hifadhi muhtasari uliotengenezwa katika `results/summaries.txt`. Onyesha usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari huu kwa kutumia seaborn na hifadhi taswira hiyo katika `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`. Zaidi ya hayo, tekeleza ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa Streamlit katika `src/visualize.py`, ambao unaruhusu watumiaji kuona maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa. Hatimaye, tengeneza ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data na matokeo ya uzalishaji, na ihifadhi kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.
Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.
Matokeo ya muhtasari uliotengenezwa yanahifadhiwa katika `results/summary_results.txt`.
Usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari uliotengenezwa unaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`.
Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa na kutekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.
Ripoti inayohusu usindikaji wa data, mafunzo ya mfano, na matokeo ya uzalishaji inatengenezwa na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/text_summarization_report.pdf`.

preferences.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano wa "Streamlit" unapaswa kuruhusu watumiaji kuingiza maandishi mapya na kuzalisha muhtasari papo hapo.
Ripoti inapaswa kujumuisha majadiliano juu ya jinsi mipangilio tofauti ya hyperparameter ilivyoathiri utendaji wa mfano.
Wakati wa maendeleo, programu ya "Streamlit" inapaswa kudhibitiwa kwa ufanisi ili kuepuka matumizi yasiyo ya lazima ya rasilimali.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya habari ya "CNN/Daily Mail" inatumika, ikijumuisha kupakia na kuandaa seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason:
<UNSATISFIED>

The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually implement loading or preparing the CNN/Daily Mail dataset. It is a "minimal semantic implementation" placeholder that only defines a `load_dataset()` function returning a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` and a `build_transforms()` function with dummy data. There is no actual use of the `datasets` library (e.g., `load_dataset("cnn_dailymail", "3.0.0")`), no real data loading, no splitting into train/validation/test sets, and no genuine preparation of the CNN/Daily Mail dataset. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings without fulfilling them.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa data unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`, ikijumuisha kuondoa vitambulisho vya HTML na alama za uakifishaji.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual data preprocessing. It contains only placeholder functions (`load_dataset()` and `build_transforms()`) that return dummy data, with no real implementation for removing HTML tags or punctuation. The file merely lists the requirement criteria as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`) without executing any actual preprocessing logic. There is no use of libraries like `re`, `BeautifulSoup`, or any string manipulation code that would remove HTML tags or punctuation from text data.

judge_stats.criteria: Mfano wa "BART" uliokwisha funzwa unaletwa kwa ajili ya muhtasari wa maandishi katika `src/model.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not actually import or use a pre-trained BART model. Instead, it only contains a string in `REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA` that mentions "BART" as a keyword/description, and a `build_model()` function that returns a placeholder string `"model placeholder"`. There is no actual import of `transformers`, `BartForConditionalGeneration`, `BartTokenizer`, or any other BART-related library. The implementation is a "minimal semantic placeholder" designed to appear compliant but does not fulfill the actual requirement of importing and using a pre-trained BART model for text summarization.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya muhtasari uliotengenezwa yanahifadhiwa katika `results/summary_results.txt`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/summary_results.txt` exists in the project structure, but its content is merely a placeholder string `('placeholder\r\n', None)` rather than actual summarization results. This indicates that no real text summarization was performed using BART on the CNN/DailyMail dataset — the file was created but not populated with genuine summary outputs. Therefore, the requirement that summarization results be stored in this file has not been meaningfully satisfied.

judge_stats.criteria: Usambazaji wa urefu wa muhtasari uliotengenezwa unaonyeshwa kwa kutumia "seaborn," na mchoro unahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/summary_length_distribution.png` exists in the project structure, but there is no evidence that it was generated using **seaborn** or that it was successfully created. The trajectory analysis explicitly states that no steps related to seaborn or the distribution plot were found in the execution history. Furthermore, the file content shows an error when attempting to read the image, indicating the file may be corrupted or improperly generated. There is no verifiable evidence that the summary length distribution visualization was properly created and saved using seaborn as required.

judge_stats.criteria: Ukurasa wa wavuti wa maingiliano unaundwa kwa kutumia "Streamlit" ili kuonyesha maandishi ya ingizo na muhtasari wao uliotengenezwa na kutekelezwa katika `src/visualize.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/visualize.py` file does not contain any actual Streamlit implementation. Instead, it only contains a minimal stub/placeholder that defines metadata strings about the requirement (REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA, KEYWORDS) and a simple `main()` function that returns a status dictionary. There is no `import streamlit`, no `st.` calls, no actual web page creation, no display of input texts, and no display of generated summaries. The file is essentially an empty semantic placeholder rather than a functional Streamlit application.
